title: The Prophet's Land
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 1 here. This marker covers John Hendrix's original farmland along Hendrix Creek.

title: Forty Nights in the Woods
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 2 here. This marker tells the story of John's forty nights sleeping with his head on the ground.
imageAlt: Trail marker 2 — Forty Nights in the Woods

title: The Visions
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 3 here. This marker recounts the prophecies John shared with his neighbors.

title: Bear Creek Valley
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 4 here. John predicted great factories would be built in Bear Creek Valley.

title: The Community of Black Oak Ridge
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 5 here. John foretold a great city would rise on Black Oak Ridge.
imageAlt: Trail marker 5 — The Community of Black Oak Ridge

title: The Manhattan Project
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 6 here. In 1942 the War Department seized this land to build the secret city of Oak Ridge.

title: Hendrix Creek
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 7 here. The creek that bears John's name still flows through this property today.

title: The Legacy
description: PLACEHOLDER — Add description of Marker 8 here. John Hendrix died in 1915 of tuberculosis, thirty years before his prophecies were fulfilled.
